summary: Tax Reports Bug Fix Verification Complete - All 15 backend tests passed, all frontend UI elements verified. The Tax Report feature fixes are working correctly: 1) Variable ordering bug fixed in tax.js 2) fy_year parameter correctly handled (2025-26 → 2526) 3) Charges breakdown from Upstox API correctly mapped including nested taxes/charges structure 4) from_date/to_date params working for full FY range.

issues: Minor: FY selector has React hydration warning (span inside option) - cosmetic only, functionality works

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: tax.js parseFY() correctly converts '2025-26' to '2526' Upstox format
VERIFIED: getFYDateRange() generates from_date/to_date for Upstox API (01-04-2025 to 31-03-2026)
VERIFIED: charges_breakdown.taxes.stt/gst/stamp_duty correctly mapped from nested Upstox response
VERIFIED: todayPositions variable defined before use (line 127) - bug fixed
VERIFIED: All pagination working - fetches all trades (7 of 7 expected)
VERIFIED: Net P&L = Gross P&L - Total Charges calculation correct
test_credentials: None required - Uses Upstox token from database
seed_data_creation: None - uses live Upstox data (7 trades from March 19, 2026)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tax Reports feature fully working with Upstox integration. 7 trades fetched for FY 2025-26, charges from Upstox API (STT ₹191, GST ₹42, Brokerage ₹100, Total ₹474). Tax calculation shows ₹812 liability (30% + 4% cess). All three views (Summary/Monthly/Trades) working. FY selector correctly refreshes data when changed.

GET /api/tax/report.details: Returns status=success with full report structure including summary, charges, tax, compliance, trade_details

fy_year_parameter.details: Correctly handles '2025-26', '25-26', '2526' formats - all convert to '2526'

GET /api/tax/upstox-summary.details: Returns Upstox charges_breakdown with nested taxes/charges structure

tax_reports_tab.details: Tab clickable, loads Tax Reports page correctly

summary_view.details: Shows 4 cards: Total Trades (7), Gross P&L (+₹3,076), Net P&L (+₹2,602), Tax Liability (₹812)

broker_charges_card.details: Shows Brokerage, STT, Transaction Charges, GST, SEBI Charges, Stamp Duty, Other Charges, Total

tax_calculation_card.details: Shows Gross P&L, Less Charges, Taxable Income, Tax @30%, Cess @4%, Total Tax

trading_summary_card.details: Shows Buy/Sell values, Profit/Loss, Turnover, ITR Form (ITR-3), Audit status, Due date

monthly_view.details: Shows table with Month, Trades, Profit, Loss, Net P&L, Turnover columns

trades_view.details: Shows 7 trades with Symbol, Buy Date, Buy Amt, Sell Date, Sell Amt, Qty, P&L columns

fy_selector.details: Dropdown works, changing FY refreshes data (tested 2025-26 → 2024-25)

data_source_badge.details: Shows 'Upstox Live' badge indicating live data source
